backend: claude --print (anthropic SDK not installed in this session)

comparison_vs_deterministic_full.note: LLM mode strips 2 more AI-isms AND restructures paragraphs; deterministic mode only touches rule-matched spans.

notes: Opt-in via UNSLOP_RUN_LLM_TESTS=1 pytest or direct CLI invocation.

Use --mode full for more aggressive rewrites; --mode subtle for conservative.
